yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_CVE20265002__PromtEngineer_localGPT_LLM_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-5002 - PromtEngineer localGPT LLM Prompt server.py _route_using_overvie"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-29"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-5002" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "PromtEngineer" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 112 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 90 as HIGH risk. 46 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
